## Parent
Reference: PORTFOLIO_V2_PRD.md

## What to build
Create the Hero section and main page layout structure. The hero should display name, title, and brief introduction above the project grid.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `Hero` component in `src/components/Hero.tsx`
- [ ] Hero displays:
  - Name: "Joshua Joel Cuevas"
  - Title: "Data Scientist | Quantitative Researcher"
  - Brief tagline/introduction
- [ ] Main layout component (`src/components/Layout.tsx`) with:
  - Hero section at top
  - TagFilter section (placeholder)
  - ProjectGrid section (placeholder)
  - Skills section (placeholder)
  - Contact section (placeholder)
- [ ] Responsive container for content
- [ ] Proper spacing and visual hierarchy
- [ ] Theme colors applied consistently
- [ ] Integration with ocean background from Issue #001
